item.text: Batch 2 is focused on the add-image helper cleanup. I’m checking the helper file, its test file, and any remaining imports first so I can remove only the optimistic-only surface and leave the retained mutation helpers intact.

I’ve confirmed the only remaining references to the optimistic helper surface are inside `addImageToShotHelpers.ts` and its dedicated test file. I’m removing that dead code now and trimming the test file down to the retained exports only, rather than trying to surgically delete dozens of individual test blocks.

The helper file and its dedicated test file have been rewritten down to the retained surface. I’m verifying now that the optimistic-only functions are completely gone, then I’ll run typecheck plus the full shot-hooks test module before checkpointing batch 2.
